pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in setup_task.sh which injects this exact value via Django ORM.
Explicitly defined in setup_task.sh which injects this exact value via Django ORM.
setup_wger.sh seed script generates exactly 5 valid measurements per category for the admin user, which is also explicitly tested in verifier.py as the minimum valid entries requirement.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically seeded data for the wger fitness manager. The target Body Fat outlier value is strictly 180.0 and the Waist outlier value is 820.0, as explicitly injected by setup_task.sh. Exactly 5 valid measurements per category are pre-populated by setup_wger.sh, matching the verifier's minimum expected valid entries.
